purpose: Rules for periodic state recovery and gentle state compaction without overloading scene context.
core_principle: Обычная запись state происходит каждый ход через applyTurnResult или аналогичный state writer.
Периодические процессы не заменяют обычную запись state; они только страхуют и сжимают.
Recovery audit и compaction cleanup не должны запускаться в один и тот же ход.
Промт не должен компенсировать плохую структуру state; сначала чинится state и сборщик, потом промт.

every_turn_state_write.purpose: Write obvious changes after every scene turn.
write_targets: open hooks created by the turn
forbidden: do not write hidden lore as NPC knowledge without an in-scene source
do not give NPCs knowledge from calendar/rules/prompt
do not flatten emotional changes into generic labels if a specific hook happened

state_recovery_audit.purpose: Review recent chat/scene history and write important missed facts into state.
allowed_actions: add missed agreements, promises, refusals or threats
add missed injuries or body-state changes
add missed protected moments if a character was strongly affected
forbidden_actions: add hidden lore as NPC knowledge without source
audit_focus: facts that were seen/heard by a specific character
facts that are still only suspicions
who has source access and who does not
items or physical continuity that the next scene may need
lines/actions that would logically stick with a character

state_compaction_cleanup.purpose: Compress stale or repetitive state and remove closed minor threads without destroying character memory.
allowed_actions: shorten long scene notes while keeping source and consequence
remove temporary scene-only notes after they are no longer needed
keep emotional hooks in protected_moments or relationship memory
forbidden_actions: delete active promises, threats, refusals or agreements
delete inventory or physical continuity facts
delete a detail if a specific character is likely to remember it later
flatten relationship dynamics into generic labels like 'friends' or 'tense'
compaction_style: Compress form, preserve emotional trace, knowledge source and future hook.
If unsure whether a detail matters, keep it as a short hook instead of deleting it.
Emotional importance is character-dependent: the same phrase can be irrelevant to one character and unforgettable to another.

protected_memory_rule.purpose: Prevent cleanup from deleting emotionally or logically important memories.
protected_memory_rule.rule: State compaction must not remove moments that strongly affected a character according to personality, relationship dynamic, fear, guilt, attachment, suspicion, trauma, duty or desire.
must_keep: phrases that emotionally hit a character
phrases a character would logically remember because of their personality
promises, threats, confessions, accusations and refusals
moments of trust, betrayal, protection, humiliation or unexpected kindness
details that connect to a character's fear, guilt, duty, attachment or hidden wound
first meetings and first strong impressions
unresolved questions a character is likely to return to
events that changed how one character sees another
can_compact: repeated routine actions without emotional or plot weight
duplicate descriptions of the same state
small talk that did not affect relationship, knowledge, suspicion or future action
temporary scene noise that no character would care about later
forbidden_cleanup: do not delete emotionally marked lines
do not delete unresolved relationship tension
do not delete a promise or threat because it is old
do not delete a detail if a specific character is likely to remember it later
do not flatten relationship dynamics into generic labels
do not remove the source of knowledge

collision_rule.rule: Recovery audit and compaction cleanup must not run in the same turn.
collision_rule.if_collision_somehow_happens: Run state_recovery_audit first and postpone state_compaction_cleanup to the next eligible turn.
